autoWithdraw.title: Konfigurasi penarikan otomatis
autoWithdraw.enableAutoWithdrawDesc: Order yang memenuhi semua kondisi di bawah dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.maxWithdrawAmountDesc: Contoh: atur 100 berarti jumlah > 100 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.dayProfitAmountDesc: Contoh: atur 5000 berarti (pembayaran hadiah - bet) > 5000 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.manualRechargeOf3DayDesc: Contoh: atur 10000 berarti 3 hari deposit Manual total > 10000 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.balanceDesc: Contoh: atur 1000 berarti saldo >= 1000 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.firstDepositAmountDesc: Contoh: atur 1000 berarti deposit pertama >= 1000 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.sameDeviceRegistCountDesc: Contoh: atur 3 berarti jumlah perangkat > 3 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.maxWithdrawRechargeRateDesc: Contoh: atur 2.1 berarti total penarikan > 2.1x total deposit tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.maxWithdrawTimeDesc: Contoh: atur 2 berarti setelah deposit terakhir sudah pernah menarik satu kali tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.grandWithdrawTotalDesc: Contoh: atur 5 berarti total penarikan < 5 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.sameIpRegistCountDesc: Contoh: atur 3 berarti akun tertaut berdasarkan IP >= 3 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.sameBankAccountCountDesc: Contoh: atur 2 berarti tautan akun bank >= 2 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.totalRechargeAmountDesc: Contoh: pilih > dan atur 1000 berarti total deposit <= 1000 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.totalWinLoseAmountDesc: Contoh: atur 5000 berarti total profit >= 5000 tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.autoWithdrawFailCountDesc: If pengguna penarikan otomatis fail jumlah exceeds this, tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.totalCodingAmountMultipleDesc: pengguna total taruhan valid/total deposit Kelipatan; if kurang dari value tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.needFirstRechargeDesc: Jika diaktifkan, pengguna tanpa deposit pertama tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.needUserNoRemarkDesc: Jika diaktifkan, pengguna dengan catatan tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.allowVirtualWithdrawDesc: Jika diaktifkan, penarikan crypto dapat penarikan otomatis
autoWithdraw.allowInvitedWheelAutoWithdraw: Allow pengguna undangan wheel otomatis tarik dana
autoWithdraw.allowInvitedWheelAutoWithdrawDesc: Jika diaktifkan, wheel-invited pengguna dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.checkRiskListDesc: Jika diaktifkan, pengguna dalam daftar risiko tidak dapat ditarik otomatis

autoWithdraw.needLimitGroupDesc: Jika diaktifkan, only grup yang dipilih dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.checkLowOddsOrderRatioDesc: Jika diaktifkan, rasio tiket odds rendah periksa; jika cocok tidak dapat ditarik otomatis
autoWithdraw.checkRejectPackageDesc: Jika diaktifkan, channel sumber yang dipilih tidak dapat ditarik otomatis

clockCorrection.title: Correct Work waktu
clockCorrection.warning: * setelah correction, performance data will be recalculated using the latest work waktu range.
clockCorrection.rule1: 1. The interval between start and end waktu must be <= 24 hours;
clockCorrection.rule2: 2. The start waktu tidak dapat be earlier than the end waktu of the previous shift;
clockCorrection.rule3: 3. The end waktu tidak dapat be later than the start waktu of the next shift;
clockCorrection.success: Work time corrected berhasil. Performance data will be recalculated.

messages.successRateStatsHint: berhasil rate stats = 15m/30m/1h/24h [berhasil Order jumlah/all status jumlah]
messages.feeRateTip: For some Vietnam channels such as deposit cards, the preset Biaya is deducted when the pengguna deposits. masukkan a decimal between 0 and 1, e.g. 0.25 means 25%. For a deposit of 1000 dengan Biaya 0.25 (25%), the actual credited jumlah is 750.
messages.createWithoutIdWarning: Created berhasil, but the API did not return the new catatan ID. Extra fields could not be synchronized.

hints.channelNameSystem: System Nama: the internal unified name used when integrating dengan the third-party kanal
hints.channelNameDisplay: pembayaran hadiah tampilan Name: the custom name redefined by the operator
hints.payoutDisplayName: The custom Nama redefined by the Operator
hints.balanceBelow: The channel will automatically close when the balance drops di bawah the configured threshold
hints.balanceUpdateTime: The last time the kanal balance was diperbarui

validation.payoutDisplayNameMaxLength: pembayaran hadiah tampilan name must be at most {max} characters

descriptions.manualRechargeStrategy: This page keeps the prototype Struktur for deposit Manual entry, approval izin, dan audit workflow. All interactions are static for now and do not write live data.
descriptions.manualPriorityValue: Prioritize compensation, reconciliation and penarikan return scenarios
descriptions.manualScopeValue: Currently scoped to finance shifts and supervisors; later we Dapat narrow it dengan real izin data
descriptions.manualRiskValue: Repeated amounts, abnormal sources and Tinggi-Frekuensi requests masukkan the recheck queue
descriptions.manualBatchTip: Batch deposit keeps the merchant prototype's impor entry and hasil daftar. The saat ini version shows static impor results only and does not perbarui live balances.
descriptions.memberProfileTip: The anggota profile card preserves the merchant prototype's akun snapshot and same-hari fund info for quick verification sebelum submitting a permintaan.
descriptions.broadcastRobotStrategy: The broadcast bot section preserves the prototype Struktur and currently shows static summaries that Dapat be replaced dengan real forms later.
descriptions.autoWithdrawStrategy: Penarikan otomatis currently syncs the prototype rule Struktur and guidance Teks only. No live approval logic runs yet.
